blended.narrative: Crested Butte is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,365 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.8" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
